sys_script_fix.description:
DEPRECATED NOTE: update in 2.8.4 | 2023-11-06 | STRY0146507 - Certification Failed Test Results - DEPRECATED
In 2.7, the Task form and Template Task form- Classification defaults to "--None--"
Run this script to set the classification field to none/clear all Tasks, Template, Template Task.
See Testing notes below. NOTE: ships with Testing on since this is optional.
sys_script_fix.name: 2.7 - Clear Restricted Class (Optional)
